hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": "LOVE-LETTER KB AVAILABLE: Before debugging any error or non-trivial problem, silently invoke the love-letter:ll skill with SEARCH to check if this has been solved before. If a match is found, surface it. After solving a tricky problem, suggest /ll save. KB index: $HOME/.claude/knowledge-base/KBINDEX.md"}}'
